condition: Observation has component[] — each component fans out into its own measurement row (e.g. blood pressure 85354-9 splits into 8480-6 systolic + 8462-4 diastolic).
narrative_md:
Sibling edge to `Observation__measurement` that expands `Observation.component[]`. The view does `forEach: component` so each component becomes one staging row; stage-2 derives `measurement_id` from `hash(Observation.id || component.code)` so each component has a deterministic, collision-resistant surrogate.

Without this edge, component data (the actual systolic/diastolic numbers of a BP reading) was silently dropped. Synthea emits ~2,650 Observations with `component`; this edge captures the inner measurements they carry.

fields.notes: LOINC → standard Measurement concept via vocab.concept_relationship 'Maps to'.
Numeric only — coded components route to observation, not measurement.
Copied from the parent Observation — components share the parent's timing.

references.notes: HL7 IG draft StructureMap — does not specify component fan-out; this edge fills that gap.
